title: Audio-First Inbox Experience
description: Introduces on-demand and playlist audio for emails and briefings, PDF attachments for Outlook, a preview chat interface, and UI/UX refinements.

features.name: On-Demand Email Audio
features.details: Tap any email card to hear it read aloud. If the audio is already cached it plays immediately — otherwise it's generated on the spot.

features.name: 24-Hour Email Playlist
features.details: Emails received in the last 24 hours are available as a continuous audio playlist. Choose which categories — Important, Finance, Product, Sales, or custom groups — are included.

features.name: Automatic Briefing Audio
features.details: Morning and evening briefings are automatically converted to audio so they're ready when you open the app.

features.name: PDF Attachments (Outlook)
features.details: For Outlook inboxes, PDF attachments can now be opened directly from Clairify. Previously available for Gmail only.

features.name: Chat Interface (Preview)
features.details: A proof-of-concept chat interface is available in the mobile app, starting with a Q&A agent against Clairify documentation.

features.name: Briefing channel swiping
features.details: The Briefing channel now supports standard swiping behaviour.

features.name: Briefing actions moved to magic button
features.details: Briefing actions have been moved to the magic button.

features.name: Unread-only Briefing list
features.details: The Briefing list now shows only unread reports by default.

features.name: Onboarding card swiping
features.details: Onboarding cards now support free swiping in all directions.

features.name: Magic button disabled on onboarding cards
features.details: The magic button is no longer activated on onboarding cards since there are no actions available.

features.name: Onboarding card badge numbers
features.details: Onboarding cards now display badge numbers for consistent UI alignment.

features.name: Account sync loading state
features.details: Syncing an account now shows an in-progress loading state with informative status messages.

fixes.name: AI engine display issues
fixes.details: Fixed AI engine display issues across multiple web admin pages, including missing engines like Google Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite.
